ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of playing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter */,
  "home_team_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the home team */,
  "away_team_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team after the event */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team after the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., shot, pass, foul) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., shooting, passing, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_event_actions" (
  "event_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-action link */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team performing the action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player performing the action */,
  "event_action_type" TEXT /* Type of event action (e.g., successful, unsuccessful) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_event_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_event_actions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_event_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_event_actions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "minutes_played" TEXT /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the team */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the team */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the team */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the team */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the team */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the team */,
  "fast_break_points" INTEGER /* Fast break points scored by the team */,
  "points_in_paint" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the paint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach (e.g., defensive-minded, offense-oriented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the game data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the roster is valid */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Contract status of the player (e.g., active, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "expected_recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date when the trade occurred */,
  "traded_from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded from */,
  "traded_to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was traded to */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_traded_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_traded_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
